database.name: Research and Publications
database.intro:
Track research projects, publications, and academic contributions throughout your training.

Usage Guidelines:

  • Submit research proposals for mentor review before starting
  • Update project status regularly
  • Add publications with complete metadata
  • Link publications to research projects where applicable
  • Maintain accurate author lists and citations

Categories:

  • Research Projects (proposals, ongoing, completed)
  • Journal Publications (peer-reviewed articles)
  • Conference Presentations (oral and poster)
  • Book Chapters and Reviews
  • Case Reports
database.singletemplate:
[[title]]

Type:[[research_type]]
Status:[[status]]
Subspecialty:[[subspecialty]]
Publication Details
Authors:[[authors]]
Year:[[publication_year]]
Journal/Conference:[[journal_conference]]
Volume/Issue:[[volume_issue]]
Pages:[[pages]]
DOI/Link:[[doi_link]]
Impact Factor:[[impact_factor]]
Research Details
Abstract:[[abstract]]
Keywords:[[keywords]]
Methodology:[[methodology]]
Key Findings:[[key_findings]]
Mentor Review
Primary Mentor:[[primary_mentor]]
Review Status:[[review_status]]
Mentor Feedback:[[mentor_feedback]]
Review Date:[[review_date]]
[[edit]] [[delete]] [[approve]]

field.name: title
field.description: Title of research project or publication

field.name: research_type
field.param1: Research Proposal Ongoing Research Journal Article - Published Journal Article - Submitted Conference Presentation - Oral Conference Presentation - Poster Book Chapter Review Article Case Report Thesis/Dissertation

field.name: status
field.param1: Planning Data Collection Analysis Writing Submitted Under Review Accepted Published Presented

field.name: subspecialty
field.param1: Cataract Retina Cornea Glaucoma Oculoplasty Pediatric Ophthalmology Neuro-Ophthalmology General Ophthalmology Basic Science Public Health

field.name: publication_year
field.description: Year of publication or expected publication

field.name: doi_link
field.description: DOI or URL link to publication

field.name: review_status
field.param1: Pending Review Approved to Proceed Needs Revision Approved for Submission Approved - Published

field.name: mentor_feedback
field.description: Mentor feedback and suggestions (filled by mentor)
